title: Learning to model other minds
summary: We’re releasing an algorithm which accounts for the fact that other agents are learning too, and discovers self-interested yet collaborative strategies like tit-for-tat in the iterated prisoner’s dilemma. This algorithm, Learning with Opponent-Learning Awareness (LOLA), is a small step towards agents that model other m
summaryZh: 我们正在发布一种算法，该算法解释了其他智能体也在学习的事实，并在迭代的囚犯困境中发现了自私自利的协作策略，例如针锋相对。这个算法叫做Learning with Opponent-Learning Awareness (LOLA) ，是朝着模拟其他m的agent迈出的一小步。
